heroHeadline: Iran Strikes Prince Sultan AB; IDF Hits Arak Reactor and Yazd Yellowcake; Missile Penetrates Jerusalem Area
heroSubtitle: Iran ballistic missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base wounds 10 US troops; IDF strikes Arak heavy water reactor and Yazd yellowcake plant; Iranian missile hits Eshtaol near Jerusalem — IDF interception failure; Houthis resume launches toward Israel; IDF strikes Beirut suburbs; IRGC 'Tehran toll booth' confirmed charging millions per tanker; Brent rebounds to ~$113
footerNote: Data updated 2026-03-28. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, Times of Israel, NPR, NBC News, USNI News.
